title: Author AisleDetailView — the per-aisle listing screen
description: Build the stateless aisle listing view. One view class serves every aisle — the aisle key is passed to the view model at construction. The layout is a TCategoryHeader banner on top, then a TCollectionSection listing every widget in the aisle with a working TCollectionToolbar above it.

context.layout_anatomy: TCategoryHeader (aisle label + tagline) → TCollectionToolbar (bound to view model cells) → TCollectionSection rendering every product card in the aisle. Layout switches between bento/list/grid via the toolbar.
context.card_rendering: Same card visual rule as shop home: visual widgets show a mini-preview inside TCollectionCard, structural widgets show a LucideIcon + name + tagline inside TCollectionCard.
context.tap_behaviour: Tapping a product card opens that widget's product detail. The view model emits the callback; the shell handles the route change.

goals: example/lib/showcase/feature/aisle_detail/views/aisle_detail/aisle_detail_view.dart exists as a StatelessWidget wrapping TViewBuilder<AisleDetailViewModel>.
The view composes TCategoryHeader + TCollectionToolbar + TCollectionSection in that order.
Toolbar mutations filter/sort/relayout the list live.
Empty search results render an in-place empty state.
Card visual rule is consistent with shop home — if a helper was extracted during task 12, reuse it.
non_goals: Business logic — no derivation inside the view.
Per-aisle custom visuals — one layout serves every aisle.
acceptance_criteria: Opening any aisle shows the header and the full product list for that aisle.
The toolbar search/sort/layout changes mutate the displayed list live.
Tapping a card opens the product detail.
Empty search results show the in-place empty state.
constraints: No Material chrome. Icons from LucideIcons only.
One view file for all aisles — do not duplicate per-aisle.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP to confirm TCategoryHeader + TCollectionSection + TCollectionToolbar APIs post-refactor.

verification_gate: Manual verification of every acceptance criterion in a running app across all five aisles.

quality_checklist.maintainability: A new aisle requires no edits to this view.
quality_checklist.dry: Reuse the card-builder helper from task 12 if it was extracted. Do not re-implement card rendering.
quality_checklist.single_responsibility: Renders one aisle's listing. Emits route intent. Nothing else.
quality_checklist.performance: Not a concern at this data scale.

workflow_instructions: Update 19's `follow_up_notes` with any aisle-specific chrome expectations.
follow_up_notes: Phase 3 task 05 created the AisleDetailViewModel. Public API:
Constructor: AisleDetailViewModel({required String aisleKey, required ShowcaseCatalogService, void Function(ShowcaseRoute)? onProductSelected})
Final field: aisleKey (String) — immutable after construction
Convenience getters: aisleLabel (String), aisleTagline (String) — from ShowcaseCatalogService statics
Derived: products (List<ShowcaseEntry>) — search→sort pipeline scoped to aisleKey, isProductsEmpty (bool)
Static constants: sortByNameAsc='Name A–Z', sortByNameDesc='Name Z–A', sortOptions=['Name A–Z','Name Z–A']
Not registered in GetIt — construct inline in TViewBuilder, passing onProductSelected callback from shell context
No filterValue cell — aisle is fixed by construction, no filter dropdown needed
The view should use MultiListenableBuilder over searchQuery+sortValue+layout, then call products inside the builder
